blockingIssues.description: Line 107: ExtractionConfig defaults store_path to `.skills` but AGENTS.md specifies user-extensible skills should be in `.swell/skills/`. Extracted skills will not be discoverable by the system's skill discovery mechanism. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1.

Line 139: TrajectoryAnalyzer has #[allow(dead_code)] attribute and its store field is never used for database lookups. The analyzer only processes input trajectory in memory without querying historical data. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1.
Line 955: Confidence calculation uses sum of all pattern frequencies (frequency_map.values().sum()) as denominator instead of per-pattern frequency. NOT FIXED since round 1.

Line 1145: Convention parsing uses wrong string slice index [3..] instead of [4..]. For input '- **name**: description', position 0='-', 1=' ', 2='*', 3='*', 4='n'. Name starts at index 4. NOT FIXED since round 1.
Line 1173: get_anti_patterns_for_error is an unimplemented stub returning empty vec with comment 'For MVP, return empty'. NOT FIXED since round 1.
blockingIssues.evidence: crates/swell-memory/src/pattern_learning.rs lines 1173-1176: Ok(Vec::new()) with 'For MVP, return empty' comment

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the skill store path convention: skill extraction outputs to `.skills/` but AGENTS.md documents `.swell/skills/` as the user-extensible skill directory. Either (a) update skill_extraction.rs to use `.swell/skills/` as the default store path, or (b) update AGENTS.md to document both locations with different purposes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: memory-skill-extraction stores to `.skills/` (line 125) but AGENTS.md line ~210 states 'Users can add new skills to .swell/skills/ - no code changes needed. SWELL discovers skills at startup.'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the skills directory structure more explicitly. The memory-skill-extraction feature extracts skills to `.skills/` but the existing skill discovery reads from `.swell/skills/`. There's a disconnect between skill extraction and skill discovery.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: memory-skill-extraction review found skills stored in `.skills/` but discovery mechanism expects `.swell/skills/`. Workers are confused about which location to use.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The memory-pattern-learning feature has three bugs that have persisted through multiple rounds: (1) confidence calculation uses wrong denominator, (2) convention parsing uses wrong string slice index, (3) anti-pattern retrieval is unimplemented stub. These need explicit fixes. This issue has been flagged in rounds 1-5 without resolution.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 3 issues marked 'NOT FIXED' in every round since round 1. pattern_learning.rs lines 955, 1145, 1173 still contain the bugs.
